name: python3-aiomultiprocess
title: python3-aiomultiprocess
summary: Take a modern Python codebase to the next level of performance (Python 3)
description:
Take a modern Python codebase to the next level of performance (Python 3)
This package contains a simple interface, while running a full AsyncIO
event loop on each child process, enabling levels of concurrency never before
seen in a Python application. Each child process can execute multiple
coroutines at once, limited only by the workload and number of cores
available.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiomultiprocess because Take a modern Python codebase to the next level of performance (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiomultiprocess as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiomultiprocess with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiomultiprocess --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
